**Description**
A clear and concise description of the feature you want to add.

**Use Case**
Explain why this feature is needed and how it will benefit users.

**Proposed Solution**
A clear and concise description of how you think the feature should be implemented.

**Additional Context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
